Boundary

Public pages are read-only.

No account, no form, no analytics, no cookies, no local storage, no wallet, no public wallet connection, no token approval, no network switch, no transaction broadcast, no funds moved, no production authority, and no user data wanted.

Public-safe posture

No account. No wallet. No user data wanted. No forms, no cookies, no analytics, no public wallet connection, no token approval, no transaction broadcast, and no production authority from public pages.
